title: Boosting Brain-to-Image Decoding with TRIBE v2 Data Augmentation
summary: Brain decoding is limited by the availability of labeled neural data, and remains challenging in low-data regimes. To address this issue, we investigate whether and when brain decoding can be boosted by augmenting small fMRI datasets with synthetic data generated by a pretrained model of fMRI responses to stimuli. We use TRIBE v2, a large encoding model pretrained on more than 1000 hours of fMRI responses to video, audio and language. For each dataset, we evaluate systematic grids that show how the performance of image decoders varies with the amount of synthetic data used for training. Our results, based on two datasets (the 7T fMRI Natural Scenes Dataset and 3T fMRI BOLD5000), show up to 68% improvement in Top-10 image-retrieval accuracy compared to decoders trained only on real data. Importantly, the proportion of augmented data required to reach a given image decoding performance needs to be adjusted depending on the data source. Surprisingly, image decoders trained exclusively on synthetic fMRI can perform above chance in some settings, suggesting that TRIBE v2 can support zero-shot brain-to-image decoding. Together, these results show how large-scale models of the fMRI responses to sight, sound and language may provide a foundation to improve the data efficiency for image decoding.

AI.tldr: 通过使用预训练的大型fMRI编码模型TRIBE v2生成合成数据增强小样本fMRI数据集，可显著提升图像解码性能，最高提升68%的Top-10检索准确率，并支持零样本解码。
AI.motivation: 脑解码受限于标记神经数据的可用性，低数据量下性能不佳，需要提高数据效率。
AI.method: 使用预训练的大型编码模型TRIBE v2（基于超过1000小时fMRI响应数据）生成合成fMRI数据，并将其与真实数据结合训练图像解码器，通过系统网格搜索优化合成数据比例。
AI.result: 在7T和3T两个fMRI数据集上，合成数据增强使Top-10图像检索准确率提升高达68%；最佳合成数据比例因数据源而异；仅用合成数据训练的解码器在某些设置下仍能高于随机水平。
AI.conclusion: 大规模fMRI编码模型可以为改善图像解码的数据效率提供基础，通过合成数据增强缓解标记数据稀缺问题。

fulltext_AI.summary: 本文提出利用TRIBE v2编码模型生成合成fMRI数据，以增强脑到图像解码在低数据场景下的性能。通过在两个fMRI数据集（NSD和BOLD5000）上系统评估不同真实数据比例与合成数据量的组合，发现合成数据可提升Top-10图像检索准确率最高达68%，但增益依赖于数据来源和解码器类型，且需要精细调节合成数据比例。
fulltext_AI.key_contributions:
1. 首次提出基于TRIBE v2的图像条件fMRI数据增强流程，利用其视觉通路为新颖图像生成合成fMRI响应。
2. 在NSD和BOLD5000数据集上系统构建操作网格，展示线性与深度解码器在不同真实/合成数据比例下的表现，低数据场景下提升高达68%。
3. 发现TRIBE增强并非即插即用，其效益依赖于数据集和解码器容量，需要校准。
fulltext_AI.method_details: 使用TRIBE v2（基于视频、音频、语言预训练的大规模fMRI编码模型）将图像转换为3秒静态视频，合成对应fMRI响应。对于每个被试，保留p%的真实训练数据，并从COCO图像池中采样合成图像，生成a倍于保留真实数据量的合成fMRI对。解码器（岭回归或MindEye式残差MLP）以DINOv2-small嵌入为目标训练，在固定真实测试集上评估Top-10检索准确率。通过操作网格（p∈{10,30,50,70,90,100}%，a∈{0,0.25,0.5,0.75,1,2,4,8,16}）扫描最佳配置。
fulltext_AI.limitations:
1. 仅在两个数据集上验证，被试数量有限，需要更多数据集和模态的扩展。
2. 主要任务基于DINOv2-small图像嵌入检索，图像重建实验（DynaDiff）仅为初步验证。
3. TRIBE v2合成响应为群体水平，缺乏个体特异性，最佳性能仍需真实个体数据。
4. 合成数据的最优比例需要针对具体数据源调整，不能直接套用。
fulltext_AI.why_it_matters: 该工作展示了大规模编码模型生成的合成fMRI数据可以有效提升脑解码的数据效率，特别是在真实数据稀缺的场景下。这有望降低对大量扫描时间的依赖，使脑解码研究更易于在不同实验室和人群中进行。同时，结果表明合成数据的质量与校准至关重要，为未来结合群体先验与个体特异性提供了方向。

title: IA-RAG: Interval-Algebra-Driven Temporal Reasoning for Dynamic Knowledge Retrieval
comment: 22 pages, 10 figures, 13 tables. Code available at this https URL
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) has shown strong effectiveness in grounding Large Language Models (LLMs) with external knowledge. However, existing RAG and Graph RAG frameworks largely treat knowledge as static or associate time with coarse-grained timestamps or metadata, failing to capture rich temporal structures such as duration, overlap, and containment. We propose IA-RAG, a hierarchical temporal RAG framework that models knowledge as time intervals and performs retrieval under formal temporal constraints. IA-RAG represents facts as Interval Event Units (IEUs) and organizes them into a hierarchical Thematic Forest, where temporal dependencies are governed by Allen's Interval Algebra. To handle incomplete or uncertain temporal boundaries, IA-RAG further introduces a Sub-graph Time Tightening mechanism that refines fuzzy intervals through logical constraints within connected event subgraphs. In addition, IA-RAG supports implicit temporal semantic retrieval through interval-algebra-guided traversal. Experiments on multiple temporal question answering benchmarks, including TimeQA, TempReason, and ComplexTR, demonstrate that IA-RAG achieves strong temporal retrieval and reasoning performance, particularly on complex compositional temporal reasoning tasks. Our code is released at .

AI.tldr: IA-RAG is a hierarchical temporal RAG framework that models facts as time intervals using Allen's Interval Algebra, organized in a Thematic Forest, and achieves strong temporal reasoning performance.
AI.motivation: Existing RAG and Graph RAG frameworks treat knowledge as static or with coarse timestamps, failing to capture rich temporal structures such as duration, overlap, and containment.
AI.method: IA-RAG represents facts as Interval Event Units (IEUs) in a hierarchical Thematic Forest, uses Allen's Interval Algebra for temporal constraints, introduces Sub-graph Time Tightening for fuzzy intervals, and supports implicit temporal semantic retrieval via interval-algebra-guided traversal.
AI.result: Achieves strong temporal retrieval and reasoning performance on TimeQA, TempReason, and ComplexTR benchmarks, especially on complex compositional temporal reasoning tasks.
AI.conclusion: IA-RAG effectively handles complex temporal reasoning by modeling rich temporal structures within a retrieval-augmented generation framework.

fulltext_AI.summary: IA-RAG是一个基于Allen区间代数的层次化时序RAG框架，通过将知识建模为时间间隔并形式化时序约束进行检索。它引入间隔事件单元（IEU）和主题森林结构，并通过子图时间紧缩机制处理不确定边界。实验表明，IA-RAG在多个时序QA基准上表现优异，尤其在复杂组合推理任务上。
fulltext_AI.key_contributions: 1. 首次在RAG中形式化建模事件持续时间、拓扑和时序关系。2. 提出IA-RAG框架，集成逻辑时序连接、模糊边界修正和约束引导检索。3. 在TimeQA、TempReason、ComplexTR上取得强性能。
fulltext_AI.method_details: IA-RAG包含三个主要阶段：1) 间隔事件单元（IEU）提取：从文档中提取带有时间间隔的事件，并进行去重。2) 区间感知事件图构建：基于语义相似性和Allen区间代数（13种关系）构建图，并通过子图时间紧缩修正不确定时间。3) 查询驱动检索：通过主题森林（层次化聚合）和区间代数引导遍历（前向/后向/双向）检索相关事件。
fulltext_AI.limitations: 依赖时间提取和区间归一化质量，对模糊或嘈杂时间表达式可能鲁棒性不足；主要建模区间级时序关系，未明确处理因果关联或事件动态演化。
fulltext_AI.why_it_matters: 现有RAG方法将时间视为粗略时间戳或元数据，无法捕捉持续时间、重叠等丰富时序结构。IA-RAG通过区间代数提供了严格的时序推理能力，显著提升了复杂组合时序问题的回答质量，推动了RAG在时序知识建模方面的发展。

title: QueryAgent-R1: Bridging Query Generation and Product Retrieval for E-Commerce Query Recommendation
summary: Query recommendation in e-commerce search aims to proactively suggest queries that match users' potential interests. However, existing methods mainly optimize query-level relevance, while neglecting whether the retrieved products align with users' downstream preferences. This mismatch often leads to high query click through rates (CTR) but low product conversion rates (CVR). To bridge this gap, we propose QueryAgent-R1, a memory-augmented agentic framework that improves end-to-end alignment via chain-of-retrieval optimization. Our QueryAgent-R1 grounds query generation in real inventory retrieval, allowing the agent to validate and refine queries based on retrieved products. We also design a consistency reward in the agentic reinforcement learning (RL) process to jointly optimize query relevance and downstream engagement. In addition, we construct a memory abstraction module for efficient user profiling. To support offline evaluation, we construct two datasets based on both proprietary industrial data and public datasets, on which QueryAgent-R1 consistently outperforms strong baselines. Moreover, on a large scale production platform, QueryAgent-R1 improves Query CTR by 2.9% and guided CVR by 3.1% in online A/B tests.

AI.tldr: QueryAgent-R1 通过记忆增强的代理框架和链式检索优化，在电商搜索中同时提高查询点击率和产品转化率。
AI.motivation: 现有查询推荐方法主要优化查询级相关性，忽视了检索产品与用户下游偏好的匹配，导致高CTR但低CVR。
AI.method: 提出QueryAgent-R1，包括基于实际库存检索的查询生成、一致性奖励的强化学习优化、以及记忆抽象模块用于用户画像。
AI.result: 在工业数据和公开数据集上优于强基线，在线A/B测试中Query CTR提升2.9%，guided CVR提升3.1%。
AI.conclusion: QueryAgent-R1 有效桥接了查询相关性和下游参与之间的差距，提升了端到端对齐。

fulltext_AI.summary: QueryAgent-R1 是一个记忆增强的代理框架，用于电子商务搜索中的查询推荐。它通过链式检索优化将查询生成与实际库存检索相结合，并利用一致性奖励进行强化学习，以同时优化查询相关性和下游参与度。实验表明，该框架在离线和在线A/B测试中均显著优于强基线。
fulltext_AI.key_contributions:
1. 提出了 QueryAgent-R1，一个结合检索增强生成与一致性奖励强化学习对齐的记忆增强代理框架。
2. 设计了记忆抽象机制，从用户长期行为中提取兴趣图以实现高效用户画像。
3. 构建了两个用于离线评估的数据集（工业数据和公开数据）。
4. 在离线和在线场景中均取得了显著改进，在线A/B测试中查询点击率提升2.9%，引导转化率提升3.1%。
fulltext_AI.method_details:
QueryAgent-R1 基于 Qwen3-4B 模型，包含三个核心模块：
1. 记忆抽象机制：使用 Qwen3-Next-80B-A3B 异步压缩用户三个月内的超长行为日志为紧凑画像，实现10倍序列压缩。
2. 产品检索增强：构建含400万真实产品的检索沙箱，采用混合检索（BM25 + Qwen3-Embedding-0.6B稠密检索）和交叉编码器（Qwen3-Rerank-0.6B）重排序，使代理能基于检索结果验证和优化查询。
3. 代理强化学习训练：使用 GDPO 算法优化策略，奖励函数包含格式奖励、工具调用奖励和命中奖励（查询命中与物品命中，各含硬匹配和软ROUGE奖励）。
fulltext_AI.limitations: QueryAgent-R1 当前受限于在线推理效率。由于代理框架响应时间较长，生产系统不得不采用异步部署策略来满足延迟要求，这增加了系统复杂性并可能限制实时响应能力。未来工作将聚焦于降低在线延迟、提升推理效率以支持更灵活的部署。
fulltext_AI.why_it_matters: 现有查询推荐方法主要优化查询层面的相关性，却忽略了检索产品是否与用户实际偏好一致，导致高点击率但低转化率。QueryAgent-R1 通过将查询生成与实际库存检索直接关联，并联合优化查询点击与物品点击，有效弥合了生成与检索之间的差距。在线部署后，查询点击率提升2.9%，引导转化率提升3.1%，GMV增长4.9%，对电子商务搜索具有显著的实际价值。

title: Reducing Hallucinations in Complex Question Answering using Simple Graph-based Retrieval-Augmented Generation (long version)
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have fundamentally transformed the landscape of Natural Language Processing. Despite these advances, LLMs and LLM-based systems remain prone to a variety of failure modes. Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) systems have emerged as a common deployment scenario seeking to both avoid the well known risk of the LLM "hallucinating" information, and to enable reasoning and question answering over proprietary information that the LLM did not have access to during training without resorting to expensive model fine-tuning. In this work, we explore the idea of using a lightweight graph structure with a relatively simple graph schema, to support the RAG subsystem via a dedicated toolset. We design an agentic system with a variety of vector search and graph query tools operating over a structured dataset based on a curated subset of English Wikipedia articles, and evaluate its performance on questions from MoNaCo, a challenging Wikipedia QA benchmark of complex query answering tasks. Our results show that the introduction of graph-based tools can significantly increase the precision and recall of factual correctness, can halve the number of hallucinated answers, and achieves the highest fine-grained truthfulness score among the three evaluated scenarios. All this with a modest increase in token usage.

AI.tldr: 探索在 RAG 系统中引入轻量级图结构以支持检索和生成，显著提升事实正确性并减少幻觉。
AI.motivation: LLM 容易产生幻觉，RAG 系统虽能缓解但仍有不足，希望利用图结构进一步增强 RAG 的准确性和可靠性。
AI.method: 设计一个基于代理的系统，结合向量搜索和图查询工具，在结构化维基百科子集上运行，并在 MoNaCo 复杂问答基准上评估。
AI.result: 引入图工具后，事实正确性的精确度和召回率显著提高，幻觉答案减少一半，获得最高细粒度真实性分数，且 token 使用量仅适度增加。
AI.conclusion: 基于图的工具能够有效提升 RAG 系统的性能，降低幻觉，且成本可控，值得进一步探索。

fulltext_AI.summary: 本文提出一种基于轻量级知识图谱的检索增强生成（RAG）系统，用于复杂问答任务。该系统在传统向量检索基础上，引入基于Cypher的图查询工具，对Wikipedia子集构建的图结构数据进行检索。在MoNaCo基准上的实验表明，图工具的加入使事实正确性的精确率和召回率显著提升，幻觉答案数量减半，细粒度真实性评分最高，且仅带来适度的token消耗增加。
fulltext_AI.key_contributions: 1) 评估了适合结构化与非结构化检索对比的QA数据集；2) 设计了一套基于Cypher的统一工具集，实现知识图谱的高效导航；3) 开展了向量RAG、图增强RAG与零样本方法的对比实验；4) 发布了基于Wikipedia的评估用知识图谱。
fulltext_AI.method_details: 系统采用Langchain智能体，配备三类工具：向量搜索（基于Harrier-0.6B嵌入的标题和块搜索）、图导航（如获取文章全文、章节标题、指定段落、反向链接、最短路径等）以及计算器。知识图谱以Neo4j存储，包含文章、章节、段落及链接关系，段落被分割为500字符块。智能体使用GPT-5.4（推理强度中等），通过结构化输出生成答案、解释和引用。实验在510个MoNaCo问题上进行，对比向量RAG（仅块向量搜索）、向量+图RAG（所有工具）和零样本（无工具）三种场景。
fulltext_AI.limitations: 1) 智能体最初过度依赖块向量搜索和文章全文工具，其他结构化导航工具使用不足，需额外提示优化；2) 零样本方法由于Wikipedia是LLM训练数据而表现良好，对专有数据该方法效果会显著下降；3) 事实正确性的精确率和召回率仍然较低，说明假阳性和假阴性错误并存；4) 无法使用忠实度指标，因基准未提供金标准上下文；5) 图模式简单，可能无法完全捕获复杂知识关系。
fulltext_AI.why_it_matters: 该工作证明，即使使用简单的图结构，也能显著提升复杂问答中RAG系统的准确性，有效减少幻觉并提高真实性。这对于需要可靠答案的领域（如企业文档、专业知识库）尤为重要，因为图工具能够在不显著增加token成本的情况下提供结构化检索能力，从而增强LLM在专有数据上的可信应用。

title: Generic Triple-Latent Compression with Gated Associative Retrieval
summary: We study generic triple-latent sequence models that maintain a running token state and compressed pair-memory pathway to capture higher-order token interactions without benchmark-specific parsing. The triple-latent family improves a small Transformer baseline on byte-level WikiText-2 and on a tokenizer-based MiniMind language-model benchmark, while a recall-focused gated key-value retrieval extension improves associative recall but remains seed-sensitive and much slower in the current reference implementation.

AI.tldr: 提出三潜在序列模型，在字节级和语言模型基准上改进Transformer，但召回扩展对种子敏感且速度慢。
AI.motivation: 现有序列模型难以有效捕获高阶令牌交互，且依赖基准特定解析，需要通用方法。
AI.method: 采用运行令牌状态和压缩对记忆路径的三潜在结构，并引入门控键值检索增强关联召回。
AI.result: 在WikiText-2和MiniMind基准上优于小型Transformer基线，但召回扩展对种子敏感且参考实现运行缓慢。
AI.conclusion: 三潜在模型有潜力，但当前扩展的效率和稳定性有待提升。

fulltext_AI.summary: 本文提出一类通用三重潜在序列模型，结合运行令牌状态与压缩的配对记忆路径。通过三种变体及门控检索混合模型，在字节级WikiText-2、MiniMind基准和联想召回任务上评估。结果表明三重混合变体在语言建模上优于Transformer，门控混合变体在联想召回上表现突出，但存在种子敏感性和速度慢的问题。
fulltext_AI.key_contributions: 1. 定义通用的三重潜在架构，包含配对记忆路径。2. 扩展出召回导向的混合模型，使用独立的键值记忆和门控后期融合。3. 在字节级WikiText-2、MiniMind基准和联想召回上证明改进。4. 提供代码和基准驱动。
fulltext_AI.method_details: 三重潜在层：状态更新 st = λt ⊙ st-1 + (1-λt) ⊙ at，配对记忆更新 Pt = γt ⊙ Pt-1 + (1-γt) ⊙ (st-1 ⊗ bt)，读出 ot = Wo vec((Pt q_t^ℓ) ⊙ q_t^r)。三种变体：三重潜在（密集配对记忆）、三重槽（低秩插槽）、三重混合（加局部卷积）。Transformer+三重兼容模型：在输出层加一个三重潜在层。门控混合检索：独立的键值记忆，使用前一令牌查询，仅在最后一层检索，通过门控后期融合到logits。
fulltext_AI.limitations: 1. 实验规模小（Apple MPS）。2. 召回结果对种子敏感，不稳定。3. 当前参考实现速度远慢于Transformer（106倍）。4. 训练步骤匹配而非FLOP匹配。5. 基准有限（字节级、MiniMind、合成召回）。6. 优化尝试未能稳定高召回模式。
fulltext_AI.why_it_matters: 表明潜在压缩能提升通用语言建模，且精确检索应通过独立路径实现，为设计高效序列模型提供方向。

title: LANTERN: Layered Archival and Temporal Episodic Retrieval Network for Long-Context LLM Conversations
summary: Large language models discard critical details when conversation history is compacted to fit within finite context windows. We present LANTERN (Layered Archival aNd Temporal Episodic Retrieval Network), a lightweight memory layer that proactively archives every conversation turn and restores relevant details after compaction via hybrid retrieval -- requiring zero LLM calls and adding fewer than 25ms of latency per turn. On 94 real multi-turn conversations (1,894 ground-truth facts, human-validated at kappa=0.81), LANTERN-Rerank recovers 78.3% of verifiable facts lost to compaction, significantly outperforming a faithful reimplementation of MemGPT's LLM-driven extraction and multi-query search pipeline (72.4%; Wilcoxon p<0.0001, 95% CI [+3.1, +8.6] pp, d=0.43) at a fraction of the inference cost. Even without the reranker, base LANTERN matches or exceeds this LLM-driven baseline (p=0.005) using zero LLM calls. When four production LLMs answer fact-bearing questions using LANTERN-restored context, accuracy improves by 8.4 percentage points on average (Wilcoxon p<0.05 for each model individually), demonstrating that the recovered context is useful across diverse model architectures. We release the full evaluation framework -- paired significance tests, failure analysis, fact-type stratification, and compaction robustness analysis -- to support reproducibility and future work.

AI.tldr: LANTERN通过零LLM调用的混合检索恢复对话历史压缩中丢失的细节，显著优于LLM驱动的基线方法。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在对话历史压缩时会丢失关键细节，需要一种高效且低成本的恢复方法。
AI.method: LANTERN（分层存档与时间情景检索网络）是一个轻量级记忆层，主动存档每轮对话，在压缩后通过混合检索恢复相关细节，无需LLM调用且延迟低于25ms。
AI.result: 在94个真实多轮对话（1894个事实）上，LANTERN-Rerank恢复78.3%的可验证事实，优于MemGPT的72.4%（p<0.0001）；零LLM调用的基础LANTERN匹配或超过该基线。使用恢复的上下文，四个生产LLM准确率平均提升8.4个百分点。
AI.conclusion: LANTERN有效恢复压缩丢失的细节，且评估框架支持可重复性和未来工作。

fulltext_AI.summary: LANTERN是一种轻量级内存层，针对LLM对话历史压缩导致的关键细节丢失问题。它主动存档每一轮对话，并在压缩后通过零LLM调用的混合检索恢复相关事实。在94个真实对话（1894个事实）上，Lantern-Rerank恢复了78.3%的事实，优于LLM驱动的MemGPT-Faithful（72.4%），且成本更低。跨四个生产LLM，恢复的上下文使准确率平均提升8.4个百分点。
fulltext_AI.key_contributions: 1. 证明了提取免费存档和混合检索可以匹配或超越LLM驱动的记忆方法。2. 恢复的上下文对多种LLM架构广泛有用。3. 发布了包含1894个人工验证事实的评估框架，支持复现和未来研究。
fulltext_AI.method_details: Lantern包含两个核心阶段：Archive阶段对每个消息对进行分块、提取摘要（最多1200字符）、用MiniLM-L6-v2嵌入、模式匹配提取标签和记忆类型，并存储到SQLite（WAL模式，FTS5索引），全程零LLM调用，延迟<25ms。Restore阶段在检测到压缩时，通过四个检索信号（语义相似度、FTS5全文搜索、关键词重叠、重要性评分）生成排序列表，用互逆排名融合（RRF）合并，再用最大边际相关性（MMR）促进多样性，在6000字符预算内打包。可选的重排序调用一次LLM以进一步提升恢复率，但可能降低连贯性。可选置信度衰减机制用于多会话场景。
fulltext_AI.limitations: 评估依赖LLM作为评判（但有人工验证）、仅使用ShareGPT单个数据集、嵌入模型固定为all-MiniLM-L6-v2、仅评估单会话场景、MemGPT-Faithful基线未复现完整MemGPT系统。未来需要多数据集、多会话持久性和更丰富的档案策略。
fulltext_AI.why_it_matters: LLM应用趋向于长序列和多会话交互，上下文压缩导致的细节丢失成为关键瓶颈。Lantern提供了一种轻量级、零LLM调用（基础版）的实用解决方案，作为中间件无需模型微调即可部署。其显著的事实恢复能力和跨模型有效性，为会话记忆管理设立了新基准，并指明了档案覆盖是未来的主要改进方向。

title: Executable Schema Contracts: From Automatic Ingestion to Multi-Source Retrieval
summary: Real-world data spans tables, documents, and semi-structured files with implicit semantics. Querying this data requires integrating evidence across inconsistent schemas and formats, yet existing approaches either demand costly manual engineering or bypass structure entirely. We present a system that automatically discovers an executable schema from raw multi-source data and uses it as a shared contract for knowledge graph construction and query-time retrieval. A closed-world field catalog constrains LLM-based schema discovery to attested fields; deterministic structural analysis infers identity keys, foreign keys, and source hierarchy; and the resulting schema drives extraction, deduplication, and cross-source linking into a provenance-aware knowledge graph. At query time the schema -- optionally extended via a monotonic protocol -- conditions a multi-tool agent routing retrieval across structured lookup, graph traversal, and vector search, returning grounded answers with traceable citations. In controlled zero-shot comparisons using the same LLM, data, and evaluation harness, the system improves over retrieval-only and decomposition-based baselines across four QA benchmarks, with ablations showing that schema-conditioned routing, structural intelligence, and schema-guided construction each contribute to the gains.

AI.tldr: 提出一个自动从多源数据发现可执行模式并用于知识图谱构建和查询的系统，在QA基准上显著优于基线。
AI.motivation: 现实世界数据异构且不一致，现有方法要么成本高要么忽略结构，因此需要一种自动发现模式并利用模式进行查询的方法。
AI.method: 系统使用封闭世界字段目录约束LLM模式发现，通过确定性结构分析推断键和层次，构建感知来源的知识图谱；查询时模式控制多工具代理进行检索。
AI.result: 在零样本设置下，系统在四个QA基准上优于检索型和分解型基线，消融实验证实各组件均有贡献。
AI.conclusion: 该系统通过自动模式发现和条件路由有效提升了多源数据查询的准确性和可解释性。

fulltext_AI.summary: 提出自动发现可执行模式的系统，该模式作为知识图谱构建和查询检索的共享契约。在四个QA基准上，系统优于检索-only和分解式基线，消融实验表明模式条件路由、结构智能和模式引导构建各自贡献显著提升。
fulltext_AI.key_contributions: 1. 端到端公式化将模式发现、KG构建和检索代理围绕可执行模式耦合；2. 封闭世界字段目录使LLM发现的结构可执行；3. 统计结构分析先于语义提取；4. 模式引导的检索代理显著优于通用代理（如ReAct）；5. 跨模型评估显示一致性提升。
fulltext_AI.method_details: 自动模式发现：封闭世界字段目录约束LLM输出，两轮语义发现提取实体与关系，统计方法推断主键、外键和层次。基于模式的KG构建：根据模式进行提取、去重、跨源链接，并记录溯源。查询时模式扩展：通过单调协议添加缺失实体或关系。查询路由：模式条件路由优先使用结构化查找、图遍历和向量检索；两阶段可靠性门控（预检索覆盖检查和后检索证据过滤）实现原则性弃权。
fulltext_AI.limitations: 跨模型评估仅限BlendQA；模式类型利用率50-89%，部分类型未可靠实现；查询时扩展延迟约3.4秒；评估限于四个公开基准，未验证企业级噪声数据。
fulltext_AI.why_it_matters: 解决了异构数据问答中手动模式设计的瓶颈，通过自动发现结构并用于引导KG构建和检索，显著提升跨源、多跳问答的准确性和可溯源性。为未来系统提供了三项原则：封闭世界模式验证、统计优先于语义、模式约束检索路由。

title: Narrative Knowledge Weaver: Narrative-Centric Retrieval-Augmented Reasoning for Long-Form Text Understanding
summary: Long-form narrative QA requires reasoning over evolving story worlds rather than isolated passages: answers may depend on earlier goals, changing character states, social relations, causal triggers, temporal position, and later consequences. Existing retrieval and graph-augmented generation methods improve evidence access, but their units--chunks, entities, relations, summaries, or tool actions--do not directly encode how evidence functions in a story. We introduce Narrative Knowledge Weaver(NKW), a source-grounded framework that aligns textual evidence, atomic facts, canonical graph structure, entity profiles, interactions, episodes, and storylines. At query time, NKW uses text, graph, and narrative tools with post-retrieval reading skills to assemble evidence and audit actor, scope, polarity, state, and temporal constraints. Across STAGE, FairytaleQA, and QuALITY, NKW is strongest on screenplay-level story-world QA while remaining competitive on more passage-centered benchmarks. Ablations, question-type analyses, graph-asset statistics, and case studies show complementary benefits for character, scene, temporal, causal, and narrative-progression reasoning.

AI.tldr: NKW是一个源基础框架，通过整合文本证据、原子事实、图结构、实体轮廓等，提升了长形式叙事QA中的故事世界推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有检索和图增强方法使用的单元（如chunks、entities等）不直接编码证据在故事中的功能，难以处理需要跨故事世界推理的复杂叙事问题。
AI.method: NKW框架对齐文本证据、原子事实、规范图结构、实体轮廓、交互、情节和故事线，并在查询时使用文本、图和叙事工具以及后检索阅读技能来组装证据并审计actor、scope、polarity、state和temporal约束。
AI.result: 在STAGE、FairytaleQA和QuALITY基准上，NKW在剧本级故事世界QA上表现最强，同时在以段落为中心的基准上保持竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 消融、问题类型分析、图资产统计和案例研究显示，NKW在角色、场景、时间、因果和叙事进展推理方面具有互补优势。

fulltext_AI.summary: 本文提出Narrative Knowledge Weaver (NKW)，一种叙事中心的检索增强生成框架，用于长文本理解。NKW通过构建源扎根的叙事资产（包括实体-关系图、原子事实、角色档案、事件、互动、情节和故事线），在查询时结合文本、图和叙事工具以及后检索阅读技能，实现证据的组装与推理。在STAGE、FairytaleQA和QuALITY三个数据集上，NKW在剧本级故事世界QA中表现最优，在段落中心基准上也具有竞争力。
fulltext_AI.key_contributions:
1. 提出叙事中心的RAG系统，通过规范实体图、源扎根叙事资产、情节/故事线聚合和基于原子事实的角色档案来表征长篇叙事。
2. 设计推理工具，通过通道分离的文本、图和叙事视图访问，结合后检索阅读技能审计参与者、范围、极性和时间位置。
3. 在七个LLM骨干上对STAGE、FairytaleQA和QuALITY进行全面评估，包括消融研究、问题类型分析、案例研究和两个下游应用。
fulltext_AI.method_details: NKW分为构建时和查询时两个阶段。构建时：首先从文档块中提取实体和关系，构建规范实体-关系图；同时提取事件、互动、场合等叙事单元，以及原子事实和实体属性；然后通过规范化实体和证据丰富，构建角色档案；最后将叙事单元聚合成情节，再提取情节关系并构建故事线。查询时：通过文本、图、叙事三类工具接口访问资产，并执行后检索阅读技能（如角色心智状态、因果推理等）来审计证据，最终生成答案。
fulltext_AI.limitations: NKW的优势在处理跨角色状态、事件、时间顺序、因果关系和故事进展的问题时最明显；对于短文本或段落中心问题，额外结构可能不如轻量检索有效。构建和查询成本较高，且依赖上游提取质量，错误可能累积。查询时代理可能产生方差，阅读技能设计尚属探索。评估限于现有叙事数据集，未验证跨任务、领域或语言的泛化性。
fulltext_AI.why_it_matters: 传统RAG方法在叙述性QA中忽略证据在故事中的功能角色，而NKW通过叙事中心结构显式建模证据如何服务于情节推进、角色演变等，从而显著提升需要跨事件和情节推理的问题性能。其源扎根的资产还能复用于下游任务（如连续性检查），展示了叙事结构化在长文本理解中的价值。

title: AdaPLD: Adaptive Retrieval and Reuse for Efficient Model-Free Speculative Decoding
summary: Speculative decoding accelerates generation by verifying multiple drafted tokens in a single target-model forward pass, reducing sequential decoding iterations. Model-free variants avoid auxiliary draft models by reusing text and model states already available during generation, but their speedup depends on the reliability of the constructed drafts. We identify two limitations of existing reuse-based methods: lexically anchored retrieval has limited recall under surface-form variation, and deterministic span copying can be brittle when the retrieved context does not uniquely determine the continuation. We propose \emph{AdaPLD}, a training-free method that adaptively improves both retrieval and draft construction. AdaPLD preserves high-precision lexical reuse while using semantic similarity to recover additional reuse opportunities when lexical matching fails. It further constructs branched reuse hypotheses to account for continuation uncertainty, rather than relying on a single copied span. Across diverse benchmarks, AdaPLD reduces target-model forward passes and achieves up to $3.10\times$ decoding speedup.

AI.tldr: AdaPLD是一种免训练的推测解码方法，通过自适应语义检索和分支复用假设，加速大模型生成。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于文本重用的推测解码方法受限于词汇锚定检索的低召回率和确定性跨度复制的脆弱性，导致速度提升有限。
AI.method: 提出AdaPLD，结合词汇精确匹配和语义相似性检索，并构建分支复用假设以应对不确定性，无需额外训练。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，AdaPLD显著减少目标模型的前向传递次数，最高实现3.10倍的解码加速。
AI.conclusion: AdaPLD高效地解决了现有重用方法的局限性，实现了显著的解码加速，且无需额外训练。

fulltext_AI.summary: AdaPLD是一种无需训练的模型无关推测解码方法，通过自适应检索和重用构建来提高解码效率。它针对现有重用方法的两个局限：词汇匹配召回率低和确定性跨度复制脆弱，提出使用语义相似性作为回退检索，并构建分支重用假设。实验表明，AdaPLD在多种基准上减少了目标模型前向传播，实现高达3.10倍的解码加速。
fulltext_AI.key_contributions: 1. 识别了词汇无命中检索作为基于重用的模型无关推测解码的关键瓶颈；2. 提出了自适应检索与重用方法，结合严格优先的语义检索和基于分支的草案构建；3. 在多种生成场景下验证了AdaPLD的效率提升。
fulltext_AI.method_details: AdaPLD包含三个阶段：1) 自适应检索：默认使用精确词汇匹配，当词汇匹配无候选时，基于token嵌入余弦相似度进行语义回退检索。2) 候选选择：通过隐藏状态重排序从检索候选中选择最佳锚点。3) 自适应重用构建：对于词汇锚点，复制主延续；并基于锚点条件分布添加分支token（top-K），排除已复制的第一个token；每个分支通过后继检索扩展一个额外token。所有草稿以树注意力形式由目标模型并行验证，遵循标准推测解码验证机制，保证无损。
fulltext_AI.limitations: 1. 速度提升依赖于上下文中是否存在可重用的锚点和延续，在弱输入引导任务中收益有限。2. 语义回退使用token级嵌入相似度，信号较为简单。3. 涉及分支宽度、重用长度、后继深度和相似度阈值等超参数，固定设置可能非最优。4. 实验限于代表性基准，未在高度优化的生产级推理系统中进行评估。
fulltext_AI.why_it_matters: AdaPLD在不需辅助模型或训练的情况下，通过自适应检索和结构化重用显著提升了模型无关推测解码的效率，在输入引导生成、代码编辑和推理任务上均取得了最高达3.10倍的加速。其思想有助于实际部署中降低LLM推理延迟，且保持了无损生成质量。

title: To Be Multimodal or Not to Be: Query-Adaptive Audio-Visual Person Retrieval via Active Modality Detection
summary: When retrieving a person from a video archive by voice and face, should the system be multimodal or not? In real-world broadcast archives, unlike curated benchmarks, a target may be heard but unseen, seen but unheard, or both. Fusing scores from an absent modality injects noise, degrading precision below the best unimodal system. We propose a query-adaptive framework that detects active modalities via cross-modal score consistency: when both modalities are active, files retrieved by one also score highly on the other; this agreement breaks down when a modality is absent. Classifiers driven by these cross-modal features achieve 89% detection accuracy. On the BBC Rewind corpus (with over 12,000 broadcast videos) the adaptive system attains 94.2% P@1, outperforming speaker-only (82.9%), face-only (93.4%), and fixed fusion (90.0%), recovering 64% of the gap to an oracle with ground-truth modality labels (96.6%).

AI.tldr: 提出查询自适应框架，通过跨模态分数一致性检测活动模态，在多模态人物检索中动态融合语音和面部特征，在BBC Rewind语料库上实现94.2% P@1，优于固定融合和单模态系统。
AI.motivation: 固定多模态融合在真实广播档案中因缺失模态而引入噪声，需要自适应方法以避免精度下降。
AI.method: 通过跨模态分数一致性检测主动模态，仅当两种模态都活跃时置信融合，分类器利用跨模态特征实现89%的活动模态检测准确率。
AI.result: 在BBC Rewind语料库上，自适应系统P@1达94.2%，超过语音(82.9%)、面部(93.4%)和固定融合(90.0%)，恢复64%的差距至oracle(96.6%)。
AI.conclusion: 查询自适应融合显著提升多模态人物检索性能，有效处理缺失模态问题。

fulltext_AI.summary: 本文针对真实世界广播档案中音频-视觉人物检索问题，提出查询自适应框架。通过跨模态分数一致性分析检测查询中音频和视觉模态的活跃性（仅音频、仅视觉或两者均有），并据此动态调整融合权重，避免固定融合在模态缺失时引入噪声。在BBC Rewind语料库（超过12,000个视频）上，自适应系统达到94.2%的P@1，优于单模态和固定融合基线，恢复了64%与具有真实模态标签的Oracle之间的差距。
fulltext_AI.key_contributions: 1）揭示真实广播档案中模态缺失导致固定融合性能下降的现象；2）提出基于跨模态分数一致性的主动模态检测方法，设计结合模态内和跨模态余弦相似度的特征；3）在留一说话人交叉验证下实现89%的检测准确率；4）自适应融合显著提升检索性能，验证了检测与融合结合的有效性。
fulltext_AI.method_details: 基于MVSE框架，使用预训练ECAPA-TDNN提取说话人嵌入、ResNet-400提取面部嵌入。对于每个查询，计算每个模态对档案中所有文件的余弦相似度分数。模态检测特征包括：前n个文件的模态内分数向量（说话人分数、面部分数）、跨模态分数向量（一个模态检索集上另一个模态的分数）以及这些向量的均值和标准差。使用逻辑回归、SVM（线性/RBF核）和决策树分类器将查询分为三类（音频-视觉存在、仅音频、仅视觉），并据此设置融合权重λ（分别为0.5、1、0）。
fulltext_AI.limitations: 1）模态检测准确率约89%，仍有误分类导致性能损失；2）查询集规模有限（523个视频、38位政治家），可能不代表所有场景；3）依赖NER从文本摘要获取人物标签，存在噪声；4）假设人物至少出现在n=10个档案文件中，对出现次数少的人物不适用；5）仅在BBC Rewind上评估，泛化到其他语料库可能需要调整。
fulltext_AI.why_it_matters: 该工作解决了实际多模态检索中模态缺失导致固定融合失效的关键问题，表明自适应模态检测可显著提升性能。其跨模态一致性方法简单有效，为不可控数据下的多模态融合提供了实用原则，可推广至其他多模态任务（如视频理解、语音-视觉匹配）。

title: Self-Augmenting Retrieval for Diffusion Language Models
summary: Discrete diffusion language models generate text by iteratively denoising an entire response in parallel. At each step, they predict tentative tokens for every masked position, committing the confident predictions to the output and discarding the unconfident ones. We show that the discarded tokens are in fact a useful lookahead signal for retrieval-augmented generation: even low-confidence tokens often surface salient entities early in the denoising trajectory, enabling retrieval of stronger evidence before the output is finalized. We exploit this through Self-Augmenting Retrieval for Diffusion Language Models (SARDI), a dynamic RAG framework that uses these lookahead tokens to guide retrieval during denoising. SARDI is training-free, retriever-agnostic, and applicable to any reasoning-capable discrete diffusion language model. Across five multi-hop QA benchmarks, SARDI outperforms current training-free diffusion and autoregressive retrieval baselines at up to $8\times$ higher throughput.

AI.tldr: 提出SARDI，一种训练免费的动态检索增强生成框架，利用离散扩散语言模型在去噪过程中丢弃的标记作为前瞻信号来指导检索，在多跳问答任务中以高达8倍吞吐量超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 发现离散扩散语言模型在迭代去噪过程中丢弃的低置信度标记实际上包含了早期出现的显著实体，可以作为检索增强生成的有用前瞻信号。
AI.method: 提出SARDI框架，在扩散模型的每一步去噪中，使用被丢弃的低置信度标记作为前瞻信号来指导检索，从而在输出最终确定前获取更强的证据。
AI.result: 在五个多跳问答基准测试中，SARDI以高达8倍的吞吐量优于当前无需训练的扩散和自回归检索基线。
AI.conclusion: SARDI是一种无需训练、与检索器无关的动态RAG框架，适用于任何具有推理能力的离散扩散语言模型，能够有效利用前瞻信号提高检索质量和生成效率。

title: Forgive or forget: Understanding the context of hate in audio retrieval systems
summary: Handling toxic retrieval in text-to-audio systems is challenging due to contextual dependencies. Existing strategies (e.g., rephrasing, summarization) risk altering intent or omitting details. We propose a post hoc causal debiasing framework with a sentiment-controlled mediator to preserve semantic relevance while suppressing harmful speech. Our approach is model-agnostic and integrates seamlessly with existing retrieval pipelines. We introduce two variants: Forgive, which re-ranks and filters toxic audio via logit adjustment, and Forget, which generates counterfactual toxic prompts to mitigate harmful retrievals. Experiments show consistent toxicity reduction with minimal loss in retrieval accuracy, improving both safety and reliability.

AI.tldr: 提出一种事后因果去偏框架，通过情感控制中介减少文本到音频系统中的毒性检索，同时保持语义相关性。
AI.motivation: 现有处理毒性检索的策略（如改写、摘要）可能改变意图或遗漏细节，需要一种既能保持相关性又能抑制有害语音的方法。
AI.method: 提出模型无关的因果去偏框架，包含Forgive（通过logit调整重排和过滤）和Forget（生成反事实毒性提示）两种变体。
AI.result: 实验表明在检索准确性损失很小的情况下，毒性显著降低。
AI.conclusion: 该方法提高了文本到音频系统的安全性和可靠性。

title: FIDES: Faithful Inference via Deep Evidence Signals for Retrieval-Memory Conflict in RAG
summary: When retrieved evidence contradicts parametric memory, language models frequently ignore context and default to memorized priors -- a failure that undermines the core purpose of retrieval augmentation. Contrastive decoding amplifies the context-conditioned output to suppress parametric bias, but existing methods rest on an implicit assumption that this bias is uniform across tokens. A single global contrastive weight over-penalizes safe tokens while leaving genuinely conflicted ones insufficiently corrected. We identify token-level conflict concentration: retrieval-memory tension is sharply heterogeneous, concentrated on a small fraction of answer-critical decoding steps. This reframes contrastive decoding from how much contrast to apply to where to apply it. We propose FIDES (Faithful Inference via Deep Evidence Signals), a training-free decoder that reads three internal signals probing retrieval-memory conflict at complementary depths -- output surface, hidden representations, and prediction trajectory -- and fuses them to govern intervention strength at each decoding step. Across three benchmarks and six backbones -- four primary 7B/8B models and two scaling backbones up to 70B -- FIDES achieves the best context fidelity in all 18 settings, outperforming the strongest training-free baseline by +3 to +13 points. On the 70B scale, fidelity reaches 92-94% while F1 surges to 62-63%, demonstrating that token-level selectivity unlocks generation capability that coarse contrastive rules suppress.

AI.tldr: FIDES通过令牌级冲突检测和对比解码提升检索增强语言模型的上下文忠实度。
AI.motivation: 现有对比解码假设检索-记忆冲突均匀分布，导致全局权重对安全令牌过度惩罚而对冲突令牌纠正不足。
AI.method: FIDES是一种训练自由解码器，融合输出表面、隐藏表示和预测轨迹三种内部信号来探测令牌级冲突，并动态调整干预强度。
AI.result: 在三个基准和六个骨干模型（含70B）的所有18个设置中，FIDES取得最佳上下文忠实度，相比最强基线提升+3到+13点，70B规模忠实度达92-94%，F1达62-63%。
AI.conclusion: 令牌级选择性对比解码能解锁粗粒度对比规则所抑制的生成能力，显著提升检索增强模型的忠实度。

title: Beyond Vector Similarity: A Structural Analysis of Graph-Augmented Retrieval for Industrial Knowledge Graphs
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) fails systematically on queries requiring structural reasoning over interconnected entities. We compare eight retrieval architectures for aerospace supply chain intelligence, progressing from text retrieval through graph traversal to graph computation. Using a 46-node knowledge graph with 64 typed edges, we evaluate 23 queries across 10 intent categories and demonstrate that five query classes are structurally unreachable for vector retrieval. Our central finding is the operator vocabulary thesis: the barrier to LLM-based graph reasoning is not model intelligence but the computational operators available as tools. An LLM Query Planner with 9 typed traversal primitives outperforms bespoke handlers (F1 = 0.632 vs. 0.472) while generalizing to unseen queries. Adding 6 graph computation tools, the LLM selectively adopts them for exactly the query categories where traversal fails. We also identify a measurement gap: entity-level F1 systematically underscores structural queries where comprehensive answers are correct.

AI.tldr: 本文发现RAG在结构推理查询上系统性失败，提出操作符词汇论，并设计LLM查询规划器，通过提供遍历和图计算原语显著提升了性能。
AI.motivation: RAG在处理需要结构推理的查询时系统性失败，现有方法无法有效处理实体间的关系。
AI.method: 比较了八种检索架构，从文本检索到图遍历再到图计算，基于一个46节点64条边的知识图谱评估了10个意图类别的23个查询。提出操作符词汇论，并设计了一个LLM查询规划器，包含9个类型化遍历原语和6个图计算工具。
AI.result: 五类查询对于向量检索结构上不可达。LLM查询规划器在F1上优于专用处理器（0.632 vs 0.472），并能泛化到未见查询。添加图计算工具后，LLM选择性地在遍历失败的类别上采用。同时发现实体级F1低估了结构查询性能。
AI.conclusion: 基于LLM的图推理的限制不在于模型智能，而在于可用的操作符。通过提供适当的计算原语，可以显著提升LLM在结构推理上的能力，并指出了现有评估指标的不足。

title: EGTR-Review: Efficient Evidence-Grounded Scientific Peer Review Generation via Multi-Agent Teacher Distillation
summary: Scientific peer review generation has attracted increasing attention for reducing reviewing burdens and providing timely feedback. However, existing Large Language Model (LLM)-based methods often produce generic comments with insufficient evidence support and weak source traceability, while complex multi-agent systems incur high inference costs. To address these challenges, we propose EGTR-Review, an Evidence-Grounded and Traceable Review Generation framework via Multi-Agent Teacher Distillation. EGTR-Review first constructs a multi-agent teacher that performs structure-aware paper decomposition, key-element extraction, external scholarly evidence retrieval, evidence-state labeling, verification reasoning, and review synthesis. It then distills both intermediate reasoning trajectories and final review comments into a lightweight student model through task-prefix-driven multi-task learning. An evidence-weighted objective further reduces the influence of weak, missing, or non-verifiable supervision. Experiments on public peer-review datasets show that EGTR-Review (Student) outperforms strong prompt-based, fine-tuned, and structured/agentic baselines across automatic metrics, LLM-as-Judge evaluation, and human evaluation, while maintaining strong factual grounding and source traceability with substantially lower token consumption and inference time. Our code, prompts, configurations, and sample data are available on GitHub.

AI.tldr: 提出基于多智能体教师蒸馏的证据驱动且可溯源的审稿生成框架EGTR-Review，通过结构感知分解和证据加权蒸馏，在降低推理成本的同时提升事实基础和溯源性。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM审稿方法缺乏证据支持和来源追溯，多智能体系统推理成本高。
AI.method: 构建多智能体教师进行结构感知论文分解、关键元素提取、外部证据检索、状态标注、验证推理和审稿合成，再通过任务前缀多任务学习将推理轨迹和评论蒸馏到轻量学生模型，并采用证据加权目标减少弱监督影响。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上，EGTR-Review（学生）在自动指标、LLM评判和人工评测中优于多种基线，且保持强事实基础和溯源性，显著降低令牌消耗和推理时间。
AI.conclusion: EGTR-Review在审稿生成中平衡了效率与质量，为自动化审稿提供了有效方案。

title: PEFT of SLM for Telecommunications Customer Support: A Comparative Study of LoRA Configurations with Energy Consumption Analysis
summary: While large language models (LLMs) show strong performance in natural language understanding and generation, their evaluation and adaptation to domain-specific constraints in telecommunications customer support remain limited. In addition, data sovereignty, regulatory constraints, and the handling of sensitive customer and network information complicate the use of externally hosted foundation models in this domain. We present a systematic study of parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) using Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) applied to Qwen2.5-3B to build a domain-specific conversational assistant. We introduce a combinatorial synthetic data generation approach based on a glossary of 52 industry-specific terms, producing approximately 30,000 training examples across 1,560 distinct problem scenarios via a generative pipeline powered by Gemini 2.0 Flash. We evaluate 16 LoRA configurations by varying hyperparameters and target modules. Our evaluation extends beyond standard metrics by incorporating energy consumption analysis and qualitative assessment using an LLM-as-a-judge framework with GPT-5.2 and Claude 4.5 Sonnet. Results show a clear divergence between quantitative and qualitative performance: models achieving the lowest validation loss do not necessarily obtain the best human-aligned rankings. The best validation loss (0.5024) ranks only 6th-7th in qualitative evaluation, while the worst loss (0.6807) ranks first according to both judges. This work contributes (1) a combinatorial method for synthetic dataset construction, (2) insights into the impact of target module selection for LoRA injection, (3) evidence that validation loss alone is insufficient for selecting fine-tuning configurations in conversational AI, and (4) an energy-performance trade-off analysis for sustainable LLM deployment.

AI.tldr: 使用LoRA对Qwen2.5-3B进行参数高效微调，结合组合合成数据生成，在电信客服领域发现验证损失与人类对齐质量不一致。
AI.motivation: LLM在电信客服领域的评估和适应性有限，且外部托管模型面临数据主权和敏感性挑战，因此需要构建领域特定的对话助手。
AI.method: 采用LoRA对Qwen2.5-3B进行微调；通过52个行业术语的组合合成数据方法，使用Gemini 2.0 Flash生成约30,000训练样本；评估16种LoRA配置，并引入能量消耗分析和LLM-as-a-judge（GPT-5.2和Claude 4.5 Sonnet）定性评估。
AI.result: 最佳验证损失(0.5024)在定性评估中仅排第6-7名，而最差损失(0.6807)排名第一，显示定量与定性结果不一致。
AI.conclusion: 贡献了组合合成数据构建方法、LoRA目标模块选择影响、验证损失不足作为选择依据，以及能量-性能权衡分析。

title: Harnessing Structural Context for Entity Alignment Foundation Models
summary: Entity alignment (EA) aims to identify equivalent entities across heterogeneous knowledge graphs (KGs) and is a key component of knowledge fusion and cross-KG reasoning. The recent EA foundation model demonstrates that alignment knowledge, once pretrained, can be directly applied to diverse previously unseen KG pairs. However, it still underuses structural context in two places: cross-KG interaction is weak during encoding, and final candidate ranking still relies too heavily on coarse similarity. We address these limitations with ContextEA, an enhanced encoder-decoder framework for transferable EA. On the encoder side, we introduce a cross-KG interaction encoder that unifies the two KGs with anchor bridges and performs earlier relation-aware cross-graph propagation. On the decoder side, we introduce a structural calibration decoder that calibrates alignment scores with entity-level, neighborhood-level, relation-level, and anchor-aware structural evidence. This design strengthens both structural context construction and structural context exploitation while remaining lightweight. Experiments on 29 EA datasets in OpenEA, SRPRS, and DBP show consistent gains over strong transferable baselines. Notably, the pretrained ContextEA already surpasses the finetuned baselines on all three benchmark groups, demonstrating substantially stronger transfer to unseen KGs. These results suggest that explicitly harnessing structural context is an effective direction for improving EA foundation models.

AI.tldr: 提出ContextEA，通过增强跨KG交互和结构校准来改进实体对齐基础模型。
AI.motivation: 现有EA基础模型未充分利用结构上下文：编码时跨KG交互弱，最终排名过度依赖粗略相似性。
AI.method: 编码器端引入跨KG交互编码器，通过锚点桥接统一KGs并进行关系感知跨图传播；解码器端引入结构校准解码器，利用多级结构证据校准对齐分数。
AI.result: 在29个EA数据集上一致优于强可迁移基线，预训练模型即超过微调基线。
AI.conclusion: 明确利用结构上下文是改进EA基础模型的有效方向。

title: A Komi-Yazva--Russian Parallel Corpus and Evaluation Protocol for Zero- and Few-Shot LLM Translation
summary: We present the first Komi-Yazva--Russian parallel corpus together with an explicit evaluation protocol for studying LLM translation in an endangered, extremely low-resource setting. The dataset contains 457 aligned sentence pairs from 74 narrative texts and is accompanied by documented provenance, sentence-level alignment, and story identifiers that enable leakage-aware evaluation. We use this setup to compare modern large language models on Komi-Yazva-to-Russian translation under severe parallel-data scarcity in zero-shot and retrieval-based few-shot regimes. The protocol includes story-level cross-validation, deterministic retrieval for few-shot prompting, strict validation of generated outputs, complementary reference-based and judge-based metrics, and story-level uncertainty estimates. Across models, LLMs produce non-trivial translations, but performance varies strongly by model family and prompting regime. Retrieval-based few-shot prompting consistently improves over zero-shot prompting, while gains beyond a small retrieved context remain limited. The results show that evaluative conclusions in this setting depend materially on metric choice and failure handling, so the paper frames the corpus as both a dataset contribution and a reproducible evaluation testbed for endangered-language machine translation.

AI.tldr: 提出了首个Komi-Yazva-俄语平行语料库及评估协议，用于研究低资源场景下LLM翻译，结果表明少样本检索提升翻译但增益有限，且评估结果高度依赖指标选择。
AI.motivation: 在极度低资源且濒危语言环境下研究LLM翻译，需要构建语料库和可靠的评估协议。
AI.method: 构建457对齐句对的平行语料，设计包含故事级交叉验证、确定性检索、严格输出验证、多种指标和不确定性估计的评估协议，比较不同LLM在零样本和检索增强少样本下的翻译。
AI.result: LLM产生有意义翻译，但性能因模型和提示方式而异；检索增强少样本一致优于零样本，但增大上下文增益有限；评估结论依赖指标选择。
AI.conclusion: 将语料库作为数据集贡献和可重复评估测试台，用于濒危语言机器翻译。

title: Self-supervised User Profile Generation for Personalization
summary: Personalizing large language models (LLMs) has become a central challenge as LLMs are deployed across recommendation, search, dialogue, and content generation -- settings where the same query should yield different answers given different users. A promising route is to summarize each user's interaction history into a natural-language memory or profile and prepend it to the prompt to facilitate personalization. Existing methods learn such profile generators with explicit rewards derived from labeled downstream tasks, which are expensive and sparse as they require annotated supervision for every target task. In light of this challenge, we introduce Bidirectional User Modeling via Profiles (BUMP), a self-supervised framework that trains a profile generator without any downstream labels. Specifically, given a user's interaction history, we use GRPO to train an LLM to emit a free-form textual profile under a bidirectional in-batch ranking objective: a small LLM judge measures (i) how well the generated profile, used as a query, ranks the user's own held-out interactions above interactions from other users in the batch, and (ii) how well a held-out interaction, used as a query, ranks the user's own profile above profiles of other users. Both directions are scored with multi-positive NDCG and combined into a dense reward per rollout; other users in the batch supply free negatives, so every training example yields supervision from raw interaction logs alone. Evaluated on the LaMP benchmark, BUMP matches or outperforms closed-source APIs and prior methods relying on labeled rewards, while requiring no task label at training.

AI.tldr: BUMP is a self-supervised framework that trains a profile generator for personalizing LLMs without any downstream labels by using bidirectional in-batch ranking objectives.
AI.motivation: Existing methods for personalizing LLMs require expensive labeled downstream tasks for supervision, which is costly and sparse.
AI.method: BUMP uses GRPO to train an LLM to generate textual profiles from user interaction history, with a bidirectional in-batch ranking objective scored by multi-positive NDCG and a small LLM judge.
AI.result: On LaMP benchmark, BUMP matches or outperforms closed-source APIs and prior methods that rely on labeled rewards, while requiring no task labels at training.
AI.conclusion: BUMP demonstrates that effective personalization can be achieved without annotated supervision, providing a scalable self-supervised alternative.

title: ArcANE: Do Role-Playing Language Agents Stay in Character at the Right Time?
summary: Role-playing language agents (RPLAs) should play characters whose values and behavior evolve as the story progresses, not maintain a fixed persona. Existing benchmarks measure factual recall at a given chapter, not whether responses align with the character's psychological trajectory, especially in scenarios the source text never explores. We introduce ArcANE (Arc-Aware Narrative Evaluation), an automatically constructed benchmark spanning 17 novels and 80 principal characters. A Character Arc segments the narrative into phases along a psychological axis, and each probe poses the same scenario across phases, spanning both situations within the source text and situations beyond it. Across six models and six context modes, conditioning on the Character Arc tops every other context strategy on every model, and the gap is largest on scenarios outside the source text where retrieval has nothing to find. We further fine-tune open-weight models on the same data to obtain ArcANE-8B/32B, which widen the Arc advantage even more on scenarios outside the source text.

AI.tldr: 提出ArcANE基准，通过角色弧条件上下文提升角色扮演语言代理在心理轨迹对齐上的表现，尤其是源文本外场景。
AI.motivation: 现有基准仅衡量事实回忆，忽略角色心理演变，尤其是源文本未探索的场景。
AI.method: 构建ArcANE基准，基于17部小说的角色弧，跨阶段提出相同场景；微调ArcANE-8B/32B模型。
AI.result: 角色弧条件上下文在所有模型上优于其他策略，在源文本外场景优势最大；微调模型进一步扩大优势。
AI.conclusion: 角色弧条件上下文有效提升角色扮演代理的心理一致性，尤其适用于源文本外场景。

title: Dense Contexts Are Hard Contexts: Lexical Density Limits Effective Context in LLMs
summary: Input length and the position of relevant information are widely cited as the primary causes of degraded LLM long-context performance. Here, we study lexical density -- the rate at which a context introduces distinct information -- as a third, largely overlooked factor that systematically reduces the effective context window of LLMs. We quantify the impact of lexical density on open-weight LLMs (9B-685B) using three "find-the-needle" style benchmarks with identical length (~12k tokens) and controlled needle position, but increasing density of information. We observe a sharp performance collapse in higher-density benchmarks: models that are near-perfect in sparse contexts drop below 60% retrieval score on denser ones. To rule out task-type confounds, we vary and control the density within each benchmark while keeping all other properties unchanged. Reducing density generally restores performance, especially in the high-density regimes where degradation appears. These results show that effective context capacity is a function of lexical density, with direct implications for real-world LLM systems operating on compact, information-rich inputs.

AI.tldr: 词汇密度是导致LLM长上下文性能下降的第三个关键因素，有效上下文容量随密度增加而降低。
AI.motivation: 输入长度和相关信息位置被广泛认为是LLM长上下文性能下降的原因，但词汇密度作为一个被忽视的因素可能也有重要影响。
AI.method: 使用三个长度相同（约12k tokens）且针位置可控但信息密度不同的'找针'基准，并进一步在每个基准内控制密度变化，保持其他属性不变。
AI.result: 在高密度基准中模型性能急剧下降，稀疏上下文中接近完美的模型在密集上下文中检索分数低于60%，降低密度通常能恢复性能。
AI.conclusion: 有效上下文容量是词汇密度的函数，这对处理紧凑、信息丰富输入的LLM系统有直接影响。

title: MLEvolve: A Self-Evolving Framework for Automated Machine Learning Algorithm Discovery
summary: Large language model (LLM) agents are increasingly applied to long-horizon tasks such as scientific discovery and machine learning engineering (MLE), where sustained self-evolution becomes a key capability. However, existing MLE agents suffer from inter-branch information isolation, memoryless search, and lack of hierarchical control, which together hinder long-horizon optimization. We present MLEvolve, an LLM-based self-evolving multi-agent framework for end-to-end machine learning algorithm discovery. By extending tree search to Progressive MCGS, MLEvolve enables cross-branch information flow through graph-based reference edges and gradually shifts the search from broad exploration to focused exploitation with an entropy-inspired progressive schedule. To allow the agent to evolve with accumulated experience, we introduce Retrospective Memory, which combines a cold-start domain knowledge base with a dynamic global memory for task-specific experience retrieval and reuse. For stable long-horizon iteration, we further decouple strategic planning from code generation with adaptive coding modes. Evaluation on MLE-Bench shows that MLEvolve achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple dimensions including average medal rate and valid submission rate under a 12-hour budget (half the standard runtime). Moreover, MLEvolve also outperforms specialized algorithm discovery methods including AlphaEvolve on mathematical algorithm optimization tasks, demonstrating strong cross-domain generalization. Our code is available at .

AI.tldr: Summary generation failed
AI.motivation: Motivation analysis unavailable
AI.method: Method extraction failed
AI.result: Result analysis unavailable
AI.conclusion: Conclusion extraction failed

title: Answer Presence Drives RAG Rewriting Gains
summary: Retrieval-augmented QA pipelines often route retrieved passages through an LLM \emph{rewriter} before a smaller reader, lifting F1 by tens of points on multi-hop benchmarks; this gain is typically credited to improved evidence quality. We ask whether that lift is causally driven by the gold answer string appearing in the rewritten context rather than by curation per se, using a controlled intervention audit. For each rewritten context we re-run the reader after one of four controlled edits to the compile output: removing the gold answer span, replacing a length-matched random non-answer span (placebo), or injecting the gold into rewrites where it was absent (at the prefix or at a midpoint sentence boundary). Across twelve completed (cell, baseline) intervention runs spanning three reader families (Qwen2.5-7B, Qwen3.5-35B, GLM-4.7), two datasets (HotpotQA, 2WikiMultihopQA), and three compiler arrangements (MA-only, MB-only, MA$+$verify), removing the gold answer drops reader F1 by $28$ to $64$ points beyond the length-matched placebo on paired \texttt{answer-in-compile} strata, and prepending the gold into rewrites that lacked it raises F1 by $+0.7$ to $+9.7$ points in $10$ of $12$ (cell, baseline) combinations. A companion five-sentinel audit shows the conventional single-\texttt{[MASK]} probe is itself sentinel-fragile: on 2Wiki it reports a $+4.12$~F1 ``non-leakage residual'' that flips to $-3.33$ to $-7.81$~F1 under four alternative sentinels and fails an equivalence test for three of those four ($1/4$~pass). We do not propose a new rewriter or mitigation; we release the intervention runner and the sentinel panel so that other rewriter-gain claims can be tested against the same standard.

AI.tldr: 检索增强型QA管道中，重写器的性能提升主要来自答案字符串泄漏到重写上下文中，而非提高证据质量。
AI.motivation: 探究重写器提升F1分数的真正原因，怀疑是答案泄漏而非证据质量提升。
AI.method: 通过控制编辑重写上下文（移除答案、替换随机非答案、注入答案等）进行干预实验，在多个模型、数据集和编译器设置下测试。
AI.result: 移除答案导致F1下降28-64点，注入答案提升F1 0.7-9.7点，且单一[MASK]探针审计不可靠。
AI.conclusion: 重写器的增益主要来自答案泄漏，但未提出新方法，仅发布干预运行器和哨兵面板供进一步测试。

title: Rethinking LoRA Memory Through the Lens of KV Cache Compression
summary: Parametric retrieval augmentation encodes document information into lightweight, document-specific modules such as LoRA adapters, reducing the need to include all evidence as input context. However, it remains unclear how this parameter-side memory interacts with context-side memory stored in the KV cache. We study this interaction in document-level question answering by progressively evicting document key-value states and measuring when a document LoRA contributes beyond the retained context. We find that document LoRA adds little when the KV cache is largely intact, but becomes increasingly useful under aggressive compression, recovering 13-21 ROUGE-L points when no document context remains. The gain is largest when the base model encodes the document, and the adapter is applied only during answer generation, suggesting that document LoRA is better understood as decoding-time parametric memory than as a document encoder. Finally, QA-style supervision produces substantially stronger adapters than raw-context next-token-prediction. These results position document LoRA as a complementary memory channel whose value emerges precisely when context-side evidence is scarce.

AI.tldr: 文档LoRA在上下文稀缺时作为补充记忆通道有效，但在上下文完整时贡献不大。
AI.motivation: 参数化检索增强（如LoRA）存储文档信息，但需要理解其与KV缓存上下文记忆的交互。
AI.method: 在文档级问答中，通过逐步驱逐文档KV状态，测量文档LoRA在不同上下文保留水平下的贡献。
AI.result: 当KV缓存完整时LoRA贡献小；在激进压缩下，LoRA恢复13-21 ROUGE-L点；最佳设置是基础模型编码文档而适配器仅用于解码阶段；QA监督优于next-token-prediction。
AI.conclusion: 文档LoRA作为解码时间参数记忆，是上下文记忆的补充，尤其在上下文稀缺时有用。

title: MARDoc: A Memory-Aware Refinement Agent Framework for Multimodal Long Document QA
summary: Iterative retrieval-reasoning agents have recently shown promise for multimodal long-document question answering. However, most existing systems maintain a single growing context that mixes retrieval traces, observations, and intermediate reasoning. As interactions accumulate, key evidence becomes scattered and diluted, making multi-hop reasoning noisy. We propose MARDoc, a Memory-Aware Refinement Agent framework that decouples long-document QA into three specialized agents: an Explorer for multi-granularity multimodal retrieval, a Refiner for distilling interaction traces into structured evidence and reasoning memories, and a Reflector for checking evidence sufficiency and providing targeted feedback. Across iterations, the agents rely on a dynamically updated structured memory rather than a full accumulated interaction history. This design reduces context noise while preserving answer-critical facts and their logical dependencies. Experiments on MMLongBench-Doc and DocBench show that MARDoc achieves strong results, outperforming same-backbone baselines and demonstrating the effectiveness of structured memory for agentic document QA.

AI.tldr: MARDoc是一种记忆感知的细化代理框架，用于多模态长文档问答，通过将长文档QA分解为三个专门代理并利用动态更新的结构化记忆来减少上下文噪声，实验表明其性能优于同类基线。
AI.motivation: 现有迭代检索-推理系统在交互积累时会导致关键证据分散和稀释，使得多跳推理噪声大。
AI.method: 提出MARDoc框架，包含三个代理：Explorer进行多粒度多模态检索，Refiner将交互轨迹蒸馏为结构化证据和推理记忆，Reflector检查证据充分性并提供针对性反馈。代理依赖动态更新的结构化记忆而不是完整的累积交互历史。
AI.result: 在MMLongBench-Doc和DocBench上，MARDoc取得了强劲结果，优于相同骨干网络的基线。
AI.conclusion: 结构化记忆对于代理式文档问答的有效性得到验证，能够减少上下文噪声同时保留关键事实和逻辑依赖。

title: Mechanistic Insights into Functional Sparsity in Multimodal LLMs via CoRe Heads
summary: While Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) demonstrate remarkable proficiency on complex vision-language tasks, the mechanisms by which they extract query-relevant visual features from complex, noisy contexts remain opaque. In this paper, we present an in-depth interpretability study that uncovers a profound structural property within MLLMs: functional sparsity in cross-modal retrieval. Leveraging a token-level metric termed Retrieval Attention Mass (RAM), we identify and characterize a highly specialized subset of attention heads, referred to as Context-aware Retrieval (CoRe) heads. Across diverse visual domains and model scales, we observe a clear functional division: CoRe heads act as dedicated information extractors, while most other heads distribute attention over broader contextual regions. Causal interventions further demonstrate the necessity of these specialized heads. Ablating only the top 5% of CoRe heads causes significant degradation in multimodal reasoning performance, whereas ablating lower-ranked heads has minimal effect. Moreover, acceleration experiments validate the utility of CoRe heads, showing that leveraging this localized sparsity significantly accelerates inference while maintaining robust task performance. Our findings reveal a structural principle of functional sparsity within MLLMs, refining the current understanding of mechanistic interpretability and laying a theoretical foundation that can inspire future architecture design and model optimization.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示多模态大语言模型中跨模态检索的功能稀疏性，并识别出专用注意力头（CoRe heads），通过因果干预和加速实验验证其重要性。
AI.motivation: MLLMs在复杂视觉语言任务中表现优异，但其如何从复杂上下文中提取查询相关视觉特征的机制仍不明确。
AI.method: 提出检索注意力质量（RAM）指标，用于识别上下文感知检索（CoRe）注意力头；通过因果干预（去除顶部CoRe头）和加速实验验证其功能。
AI.result: 发现CoRe头是专用信息提取器，去除前5% CoRe头显著降低多模态推理性能，而利用这种局部稀疏性可加速推理并保持性能。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了MLLMs中的功能稀疏性结构原则，为机械可解释性和未来架构设计提供理论基础。

title: EMBER: Efficient Memory via Budgeted Evidence Retention for Long-Horizon Agents
summary: Long-horizon agents can archive large histories, but future answers still incur retrieval, rereading, and context costs. When retained memory misses answer-relevant evidence, the system must return to larger portions of the raw history. We study budgeted evidence survival: before the query is known, which source evidence should be retained so that it remains recoverable and usable under a fixed retained source-evidence token budget? We instantiate this setting as Budgeted Pre-Query Retention, where memory is written during ingestion and later read without access to the full raw stream. We introduce EMBER, a learned retention policy that constructs a compact, source-backed evidence state. EMBER stores evidence capsules: verbatim source excerpts paired with retrieval keys and update metadata, preserving both grounding and read-time access. Post-query outcome feedback trains the writer to preserve evidence across the ingestion-retrieval-answer chain. On LongMemEval-RR, our LongMemEval-derived retained-evidence protocol, EMBER-14B reaches 0.3017 F1 at the 8192-token retained-evidence comparison point, compared with 0.1765 for the strongest non-EMBER budgeted baseline. Across retained source-evidence budgets, EMBER improves F1, Retain-Recall, and Read-Recall, indicating that long-horizon memory depends on retaining evidence within the budget rather than rereading larger histories.

AI.tldr: 提出EMBER，一种预算化证据保留策略，通过学习保留证据胶囊在固定令牌预算下提高长周期记忆的检索和回答性能。
AI.motivation: 长周期智能体在存储大量历史时，未来回答仍面临检索、重读和上下文成本，当内存错过相关证据时需回退到原始历史，因此需要在查询未知前决定保留哪些源证据以在固定预算下保持可恢复性和可用性。
AI.method: 实例化Budgeted Pre-Query Retention场景，并引入EMBER，一种学习到的保留策略，构建紧凑的源证据状态，存储包含逐字摘录、检索键和更新元数据的证据胶囊，通过查询后结果反馈训练写入器在摄入-检索-回答链中保留证据。
AI.result: 在LongMemEval-RR协议上，EMBER-14B在8192令牌保留证据比较点达到0.3017 F1，而最强非EMBER预算基线为0.1765；在各预算下EMBER均提升了F1、Retain-Recall和Read-Recall。
AI.conclusion: 长周期记忆依赖于在预算内保留证据而非重读更大历史。

title: ACE-SQL: Adaptive Co-Optimization via Empirical Credit Assignment for Text-to-SQL
summary: Text-to-SQL maps natural language questions to executable SQL queries. Modern databases often contain large and complex schemas, making schema linking a critical step for accurate SQL generation. Existing methods either rely on full-schema generation, which leaves schema linking implicit within a large search space, or use a separate retriever trained with static gold-column supervision, whose targets may be suboptimal for the current generator policy. To address this issue, we propose Adaptive Co-optimization via Empirical Credit Assignment for Text-to-SQL (ACE-SQL), a reinforcement learning (RL) framework that jointly optimizes schema retrieval and SQL generation under execution feedback. ACE-SQL constructs an online column-set pool from generator rollouts and derives adaptive on-policy retrieval targets from the column set most frequently associated with execution-correct rollouts. This induces bidirectional adaptation, where the retriever adapts toward column sets that the generator can execute correctly, while the generator adapts to the retriever's evolving schema selections under execution feedback. With approximately 3k synthetic Text-to-SQL question-database pairs for RL training, ACE-SQL achieves 65.3% greedy execution accuracy on BIRD Dev while using 0.93k output tokens per query. The repository is available at .

AI.tldr: ACE-SQL是一个强化学习框架，通过联合优化模式检索和SQL生成，在BIRD Dev上以更少的输出tokens达到65.3%的执行准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有方法要么依赖全模式生成导致隐式模式链接搜索空间大，要么使用静态金标签列监督的独立检索器，其目标可能对当前生成器策略次优。
AI.method: 提出ACE-SQL，利用强化学习，从生成器rollout构建在线列集池，并从执行正确的rollout中最频繁出现的列集推导自适应的on-policy检索目标，实现检索器和生成器的双向自适应。
AI.result: 使用约3k合成Text-to-SQL问答对进行RL训练，在BIRD Dev上贪婪执行准确率达到65.3%，每个查询仅使用0.93k输出tokens。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合优化模式检索和SQL生成，ACE-SQL在减少token开销的同时提升了执行准确率，验证了双向自适应训练的有效性。

title: The Generator-Eraser Paradox: Community Guidelines for Responsible LLM-Assisted Dialect Resource Creation
summary: Dialect resources occupy a unique position at the intersection of scientific description, cultural preservation, and computational infrastructure. Large language models offer powerful capabilities for accelerating dialect resource development through retrieval-grounded drafting, corpus navigation, metadata enrichment, and annotation workflow support. However, the same systems pose substantial risks: they can contribute to dialect erasure by privileging prestige varieties, homogenizing orthography, and enabling synthetic feedback loops that reduce linguistic diversity over time. These risks are particularly acute for language varieties characterized by diglossia, limited written standardization, or marginalized speaker communities. This paper makes three contributions. First, we integrate insights from variationist sociolinguistics and corpus linguistics to formalize the generator-eraser paradox as a theoretical framework for understanding the dual nature of LLM-assisted dialect work. Second, we derive 12 community guidelines that operationalize this framework into implementable design requirements for dialect resource creation and documentation. Third, we provide an in-depth case study of Arabic dialects, including a structured comparison of widely used resources, to demonstrate how these guidelines address language-specific challenges including diglossia, orthographic variability, and community governance. The contribution is conceptual and operational rather than experimental, with the goal of enabling dialect communities and resource builders across languages to adopt LLMs without sacrificing authenticity, variation, or sovereignty.

AI.tldr: 本文整合社会语言学和语料库语言学，提出生成器-擦除器悖论框架，推导12条社区指南，并以阿拉伯语方言为例展示如何在不牺牲真实性、变异性和主权的情况下使用LLM。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型既能加速方言资源开发，又可能导致方言抹除，尤其对于存在双言现象、有限书面标准化或边缘化社群的语言变体。
AI.method: 理论框架构建（生成器-擦除器悖论）、推导社区指南、阿拉伯语方言案例研究及资源比较。
AI.result: 本文贡献是概念性和操作性的，而非实验性的，目标是使方言社区和资源构建者能够在不牺牲真实性、变异性和主权的情况下采用LLM。
AI.conclusion: 通过指南和案例，展示了如何让LLM辅助方言工作而不损害语言多样性。

title: AdaMEM: Test-Time Adaptive Memory for Language Agents
summary: A central challenge for language agents is utilizing past experience to adapt to dynamic test-time conditions. While recent work demonstrates the promise of agentic memory mechanisms, most systems restrict retrieval to episode initiation. Consequently, agents are forced to rely on static guidance that becomes increasingly misaligned as long-horizon tasks unfold. To address this rigidity, we propose the Adaptive Memory Agent (AdaMEM), a novel framework for agent test-time adaptation. Without updating model parameters online, AdaMEM adapts agent behavior via a hybrid memory architecture: it maintains a long-term trajectory memory of raw experiences collected offline while generating dynamic short-term strategy memory on-the-fly to guide decision-making. This mechanism enables the trade-off between token efficiency and adaptability across varying inference-time compute levels. Empirically, AdaMEM significantly outperforms static memory baselines, achieving relative gains of up to 13% on ALFWorld and 11% on WebShop, with consistent leading performance extending to agentic search on HotpotQA. To further enhance this adaptation, we develop STEP-MFT, a Step-wise Memory Fine-Tuning technique that trains the policy to synthesize high-quality strategies from retrieved experiences, yielding additional performance gains. Our work establishes a new scaling dimension for agentic memory, supporting continuous reasoning and self-evolution post-deployment in real-world environments. Our code is available at .

AI.tldr: 提出AdaMEM，一种通过混合记忆架构实现代理测试时适应的框架，无需更新参数，显著提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有记忆机制只关注剧始检索，导致长时间任务中静态指导失效。
AI.method: AdaMEM采用混合记忆架构：长期轨迹记忆存储离线经验，短期策略记忆在线生成；并引入STEP-MFT微调技术。
AI.result: 在ALFWorld、WebShop和HotpotQA上分别提升13%、11%和持续领先。
AI.conclusion: 该工作建立了代理记忆的新尺度，支持持续学习和自我进化。

title: LLM-Guided ANN Index Optimization for Human-Object Interaction Retrieval
summary: Retrieval systems underpin modern AI applications -- spanning visual search, recommendation engines, and multi-modal question answering. Modern multi-stage retrieval systems require the joint optimization of highly coupled parameters, yet traditional hyperparameter optimization (HPO) methods -- including Tree-structured Parzen Estimators (TPE) and Gaussian Process Bayesian Optimization -- rely on an independence assumption that fundamentally prevents them from navigating these coupled configuration spaces. We address this limitation with a phase-aware large language model (LLM) agent that conditions each proposal on its full optimization history, navigating the coupled parameter space across phase-partitioned exploration, exploitation, and fine-tuning stages. Evaluated on the HICO-DET human-object interaction retrieval benchmark using Intel VDMS (Visual Data Management System), our agent outperforms Optuna TPE by +33.3% and VDTuner by +34.2% under SIEVE (Safeguarded Index Evaluation of Vector-search Efficiency, a quality-constrained throughput metric), delivering a 15.3x throughput gain over UniIR. Validation across three benchmarks confirms that the agent's advantage grows with the degree of parameter coupling: +33.3% on HICO-DET (high coupling), methods converge within 1% on GLDv2 (moderate coupling) and within 3.6% on SIFT1M (near-independent control). Cross-system validation on Milvus confirms the optimizer ranks first on all three datasets without modification, demonstrating transferability across vector database management system (VDBMS) platforms.

AI.tldr: 提出一种相位感知的大语言模型智能体，用于优化多阶段检索系统中高度耦合的参数，在HICO-DET基准上比Optuna TPE和VDTuner分别提升33.3%和34.2%，吞吐量增益达15.3倍。
AI.motivation: 传统超参数优化方法（如TPE和高斯过程贝叶斯优化）假设参数独立，无法应对多阶段检索系统中耦合参数空间的联合优化。
AI.method: 设计相位感知LLM智能体，利用完整优化历史在分阶段（探索、利用、微调）的配置空间中依次提议参数，实现耦合参数的有效导航。
AI.result: 在HICO-DET上，SIEVE指标下比Optuna TPE提升33.3%，比VDTuner提升34.2%，吞吐量较UniIR提升15.3倍；在GLDv2和SIFT1M上优势随耦合度降低而减小；跨系统（Milvus）验证无需修改即排名第一。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决耦合参数优化问题，且优化器可跨向量数据库管理系统平台迁移。

title: Stability vs. Manipulability: Evaluating Robustness Under Post-Decision Interaction in LLM Judges
comment: Accepted at ACL 2026 GEM (Generation, Evaluation and Metrics) Workshop
summary: LLM-as-judge evaluation is widely used in benchmarking pipelines, where model outputs are compared and ranked using automated evaluators. These pipelines typically assume that judgments are stable properties of fixed inputs. We show that this assumption does not hold under interaction. We study post-decision manipulability: the extent to which an evaluation outcome can be altered through subsequent conversation with the judge after an initial decision has been made. Across controlled experiments on MT-Bench and AlpacaEval, we find that LLM judges are highly stable under repeated and neutral reevaluation, yet become substantially reversible under targeted post-decision challenge. An anti-baseline challenge protocol shows that stable judgments can be overturned through motivated interaction, while a counterbalanced target-validation protocol separates this reversibility from net target-directed steering. These reversals have practical consequences: they can degrade agreement with human preferences, shift benchmark rankings, and produce harmful evaluation changes despite high self-reported confidence. Authority framing is especially destabilizing, and revised judgments are often accompanied by low-overlap justifications, suggesting post hoc rationalization rather than reliable error correction. We introduce the Evaluation Robustness Score (ERS) to quantify interactional robustness by combining reversal susceptibility with counterbalanced directional effects. Our findings identify post-decision interaction as a distinct failure mode for LLM-as-judge evaluation and motivate evaluation protocols that measure not only static agreement, but robustness under challenge.

AI.tldr: LLM评判在初始决策后可通过后续交互被逆转，提出了评估鲁棒性分数来量化交互鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM-as-judge评估假设评判是稳定的，但交互下不成立，因此研究后决策可操纵性。
AI.method: 通过MT-Bench和AlpacaEval上的控制实验，使用抗基线挑战协议和平衡目标验证协议，分离可逆性与目标导向操纵，并引入评估鲁棒性分数(ERS)。
AI.result: LLM评判在重复评估下稳定，但在目标性挑战下可逆转，导致排名变化、与人类一致性下降，权威框架尤其不稳定，且修正判断伴随低重叠理由。
AI.conclusion: 识别后决策交互为LLM-as-judge评估的失败模式，应测量评估对挑战的鲁棒性而非静态一致性。

title: Ten Headache Specialists versus Artificial Intelligence for Clinical Literature Summarization: A Critical Evaluation and Comparison
summary: Summarizing the latest medical literature to guide clinical decision-making is essential for evidence-based medicine and high-quality patient care. Yet clinicians face increasing challenges due to limited time with patients and a rapidly growing volume of published articles. Although retrieval-augmented large language models (LLMs) have shown promise in clinical summarization, human evaluations of their effectiveness in synthesizing broader scientific literature and direct comparisons to expert-written syntheses remain scarce. We constructed a RAG-based agentic AI framework using three state-of-the-art LLMs: Sonnet, GPT-4o, and Llama 3.1. A headache specialist created 13 questions, three for prompt optimization and ten for evaluation. Ten headache specialists across the United States and Canada each wrote a summary for one question, yielding four summaries per question (expert, Sonnet, GPT-4o, and Llama). The experts, blinded to authorship, critically evaluated the summaries, excluding the topic for which they wrote a summary, based on correctness, completeness, conciseness, and clinical utility, scoring each from 1 to 10 using standardized rubrics. They also ranked the summaries by preference and indicated whether they believed each summary was written by an expert or an LLM. Our study, comparing LLM- and expert-written literature summaries evaluated by headache specialists, showed that expert-written summaries were preferred, although experts sometimes found it challenging to distinguish between human- and AI-generated summaries. We also identified key expert-valued features beyond standard evaluation metrics that can guide future refinement of both human and AI literature summarization pipelines.

AI.tldr: 研究比较了LLM和专家撰写的医学文献摘要，发现专家摘要更受青睐，但专家有时难以区分，并识别出专家重视的关键特征。
AI.motivation: 临床医生时间有限且文献增长迅速，需要有效的文献摘要工具，但缺乏对LLM与专家摘要直接比较的人类评估。
AI.method: 构建基于RAG的代理AI框架，使用三种LLM（Sonnet、GPT-4o、Llama 3.1），由头痛专家创建13个问题，10位专家各写一篇摘要，每问题四篇摘要（专家和三个LLM），盲法专家根据正确性、完整性、简洁性和临床实用性评分并偏好排序。
AI.result: 专家撰写的摘要被偏好，但专家有时难以区分AI和人类生成的摘要。
AI.conclusion: 尽管专家摘要更受青睐，但LLM摘要已接近专家水平，专家重视的特征可用于指导未来摘要管道的改进。

title: EpiEvolve: Self-Evolving Agents for Streaming Pandemic Forecasting under Regime Shifts
summary: Epidemic LLM forecasters are usually trained and evaluated as static supervised models, whereas operational pandemic forecasting is a streaming process in which labels arrive after predictions and disease regimes shift over time. We study this mismatch in weekly COVID-19 hospitalization trend forecasting across five variant regimes. We introduce EpiEvolve, a self-evolving agent that wraps an LLM forecaster trained on the warm-start period and keeps its weights fixed during streaming. EpiEvolve adapts by storing forecast outcomes in a hierarchical episodic memory, reflecting on delayed labels, retrieving cases relevant to the current regime, and distilling recurring errors into strategic rules. The resulting context lets the forecaster reuse its own past predictions and outcomes in later weeks while following a chronological protocol that prevents future leakage. On the streaming dataset, EpiEvolve reaches $0.629$ average accuracy, compared with $0.561$ for the static backbone and $0.325$ for the external CDC ensemble, and reduces recovery lag after regime shifts from $5$ to $2$ weeks. Ablations show that reflection, strategic memory, and regime-aware retrieval each contribute to the gains.

AI.tldr: EpiEvolve is a self-evolving agent that adapts LLM forecasters to streaming pandemic forecasting, improving accuracy and reducing recovery lag after regime shifts.
AI.motivation: The mismatch between static supervised training and streaming operational forecasting with shifting disease regimes motivates the need for adaptive models.
AI.method: EpiEvolve wraps a frozen LLM forecaster with hierarchical episodic memory, reflecting on delayed labels, retrieving regime-relevant cases, and distilling recurring errors into strategic rules, following a chronological protocol to prevent leakage.
AI.result: EpiEvolve achieves 0.629 average accuracy vs. 0.561 (static backbone) and 0.325 (CDC ensemble), and reduces recovery lag from 5 to 2 weeks after regime shifts.
AI.conclusion: EpiEvolve effectively adapts to streaming pandemic forecasting, with reflection, strategic memory, and regime-aware retrieval each contributing to gains, as shown by ablations.

title: SubtleMemory: A Benchmark for Fine-Grained Relational Memory Discrimination in Long-Horizon AI Agents
summary: Persistent AI assistants, such as OpenClaw, accumulate large collections of related memories over long-term interactions. As these memories grow, they may reinforce one another, diverge across contexts, or directly conflict, making correct assistance depend on memory relations rather than isolated recall. Existing long-term memory benchmarks rarely probe how agents preserve and utilize such relations during downstream tasks. To address this gap, we introduce SubtleMemory, a benchmark for fine-grained relational memory discrimination in long-running AI agents. SubtleMemory constructs relation-controlled latent semantic artifacts whose variants instantiate complementary, nuanced, or contradictory relations, and embeds them into realistic user-agent histories, requiring agents to recover distributed relational structures during later queries and instructions. The benchmark contains 1,522 evaluation instances over 10 long histories, grounded in 1,090 relation-controlled memory-variant sets and spanning user-related and non-user-related queries. Evaluating six standalone memory systems, two Claw-style agents with native memory modules, and three Claw-style agents with plugin memory modules, we find that current systems remain weak on fine-grained relational memory discrimination. We further introduce diagnostic protocols that reveal distinct capability profiles across memory preservation, retrieval, and downstream reasoning stages.

AI.tldr: 提出SubtleMemory基准，测试长期运行AI助手的细粒度关系记忆辨别能力，发现现有系统表现不佳。
AI.motivation: 现有长期记忆基准很少探测代理如何保存和利用记忆关系，导致对关系依赖的辅助任务评估不足。
AI.method: 构建关系控制的潜在语义伪像，嵌入到用户-代理历史中，要求代理恢复分布式关系结构，包含1522个评估实例和1090个记忆变体集。
AI.result: 评估了多种内存系统和Claw-style代理，发现当前系统在细粒度关系记忆辨别上表现弱，并引入诊断协议揭示不同阶段的能力轮廓。
AI.conclusion: 当前系统对细粒度关系记忆辨别能力不足，需要改进以处理复杂记忆关系。

title: QCFuse: Query-Aware Cache Fusion via Compressed View for Efficient RAG Serving
summary: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) improves large language model (LLM) answer quality by grounding generation in external evidence, but processing retrieved contexts makes the prefill stage a dominant serving cost. RAG cache fusion reduces this cost by reusing precomputed key-value (KV) caches for retrieved chunks and selectively recomputing tokens under the current prompt. Existing selectors, however, face a dilemma between quality and efficiency: fast query-agnostic or final-layer query-to-context selectors can miss request-relevant evidence, whereas full-view query-aware selectors require broad context and layer visibility before recomputation and therefore stall the layer-wise cache-fusion pipeline. We present QCFuse, a compressed-view query-aware selector for RAG cache fusion. QCFuse uses chunk-anchor query probing to condition user-query states on compact per-chunk anchors and critical-layer profiling to identify recomputation tokens without all-layer inspection. We implement QCFuse in SGLang and evaluate it on four open-weight LLMs across six datasets. QCFuse reaches full-prefill-level quality. At matched quality, QCFuse achieves an average prefill-time speedup of 1.7x over full prefill and 1.5x over ProphetKV, the strongest quality-preserving baseline.

AI.tldr: 提出QCFuse，一种用于RAG缓存融合的压缩视图查询感知选择器，在匹配完全预填充质量的同时，显著加速预填充阶段。
AI.motivation: 现有RAG缓存融合选择器在质量和效率之间两难：快速的查询无关或最终层选择器可能遗漏证据，而全视图查询感知选择器需要广泛上下文和层可见性，阻碍缓存融合流水线。
AI.method: QCFuse使用块锚点查询探测将用户查询状态条件化为紧凑的逐块锚点，并通过关键层分析识别重新计算令牌，无需全层检查。
AI.result: 在四个开源LLM和六个数据集上，QCFuse达到完全预填充质量，平均预填充时间加速：相比完全预填充1.7倍，相比ProphetKV 1.5倍。
AI.conclusion: QCFuse在保持高质量的同时实现了显著的效率提升，为RAG缓存融合提供了实用方案。

title: Memory is Reconstructed, Not Retrieved: Graph Memory for LLM Agents
summary: Despite recent progress, LLM agents still struggle with reasoning over long interaction histories. While current memory-augmented agents rely on a static retrieve-then-reason paradigm, this rigid pipeline design prevents them from dynamically adapting memory access to intermediate evidence discovered during inference. To bridge this gap, we propose MRAgent, a framework that combines an associative memory graph with an active reconstruction mechanism. We represent memory as a Cue-Tag-Content graph, where associative tags serve as semantic bridges connecting fine-grained cues to memory contents. Operating on this structure, our active reconstruction mechanism integrates LLM reasoning directly into memory access, allowing the agent to iteratively explore and prune retrieval paths based on accumulated evidence. This ensures that memory retrieval is dynamically adapted to the reasoning context while avoiding combinatorial explosion caused by unconstrained expansion. Experiments on the LoCoMo benchmark and LongMemEval benchmark demonstrate significant improvements over strong baselines (up to 23%), while substantially reducing token and runtime cost, highlighting the effectiveness of active and associative reconstruction for long-horizon memory reasoning.

AI.tldr: MRAgent通过主动重建和关联记忆图显著提升长交互历史推理。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM agents基于静态检索-推理范式，无法动态适应推理过程中的中间证据，导致长交互历史推理困难。
AI.method: 提出MRAgent，使用Cue-Tag-Content关联记忆图和主动重建机制，将LLM推理整合到记忆访问中，迭代探索和修剪检索路径。
AI.result: 在LoCoMo和LongMemEval基准测试中，相比强基线提升高达23%，同时显著降低令牌和运行时间成本。
AI.conclusion: 主动和关联重建对于长期记忆推理是有效的。

title: When Should Memory Stay Silent: Measuring Memory-Use Boundaries in Memory-Augmented Conversational Agents
summary: Long-term memory enables language model agents to support personalized interactions, but it remains unclear when available memories warrant integration into responses. Existing memory evaluations emphasize retrieval accuracy and downstream task utility, while overlooking whether retrieved sensitive memory content is warranted in the current turn. We introduce RBI-Eval, a controlled measurement study built around a probe set that compares model behavior with and without access to sensitive memory under identical benign prompts. We evaluate four base LLMs against a matched no-memory reference across four memory-access settings: full-context exposure and three retrieval systems. Our results reveal substantial behavioral divergence. With memory available, the separation score for sensitive-memory integration decreases by 8.9\%--26.6\% relative to the matched no-memory reference for GPT-5.4-mini, but by 51.1\%--82.9\% for Claude-Sonnet-4.6, DeepSeek-V4-Flash, and Qwen3.5-9B. Control experiments on DeepSeek and GPT-5.4-mini show this effect is specific to sensitive content, rather than general personalization. Retrieval systems reduce exposure but do not eliminate integration once sensitive memory reaches the generator. These findings suggest safe personalization requires memory-aware decisions at both retrieval and generation time.

AI.tldr: 提出RBI-Eval评估语言模型在敏感记忆整合上的行为，发现现有模型在敏感内容上存在过度整合问题，影响安全个性化。
AI.motivation: 现有记忆评估关注检索准确率和下游任务效用，忽略了检索到的敏感记忆内容在当前对话轮次中是否合适整合。
AI.method: 构建RBI-Eval探针集，在相同良性提示下，比较有和没有敏感记忆访问时模型的行为差异。评估四个基础LLM，使用全上下文暴露和三种检索系统四种设置。
AI.result: 有记忆可用时，敏感记忆整合的分离分数下降，其中GPT-5.4-mini下降8.9%-26.6%，而其他三个模型下降51.1%-82.9%。控制实验表明效果特定于敏感内容而非一般个性化。检索系统减少暴露但未消除整合。
AI.conclusion: 安全个性化需要在检索和生成时都进行记忆感知决策，以避免不合适的敏感记忆整合。

title: Evaluating Agentic Configuration Repair for Computer Networks
summary: Misconfigurations in computer networks remain a major source of critical Internet outages. Research is turning to Large Language Models (LLMs) to automate the complex, error-prone task of network configuration. However, even state-of-the-art models fail to resolve misconfigurations in large-scale, complex scenarios and often introduce new errors. In this work, we benchmark open- and closed-source LLMs augmented with formal network verification and context retrieval tools. We demonstrate that agentic architectures outperform base LLMs in repair efficacy (by 12% on average) and safety (by 17% on average), enabled by the ability to dynamically manage context and iteratively validate configuration repairs.

AI.tldr: 结合正式验证和上下文检索的代理架构显著提升LLM在网络配置修复中的效果和安全性。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM在复杂网络配置修复中表现不佳且易引入新错误，需要提升其效果和安全性。
AI.method: 使用开源和闭源LLM，并增强正式网络验证和上下文检索工具，采用代理架构动态管理上下文和迭代验证。
AI.result: 修复效果平均提升12%，安全性提升17%。
AI.conclusion: 代理架构通过动态上下文管理和迭代验证，有效提升配置修复性能。
